title: Panic Never Pays: Avoid These 5 Dividend Stocks And Buy These 5 Instead
text: Panic never pays. It seems the market could go up just as well as it could go down.

title: 8 Defensive Dividend Stars That Could Help You Retire Rich
text: Most people are far behind on their retirement goals - often without realizing it. In this article, I present conservative dividend growth investing as a suitable way to achieve long-term financial goals with subdued risks (getting rich slowly).

title: Northrop's Space Business Is About to Get $2 Billion Bigger
text: For 15 years, Northrop Grumman and its predecessor companies have kept the International Space Station supplied with everything its astronauts need. Earlier this month, NASA confirmed it's considering giving Northrop an extension on its contract through 2030.

title: Northrop Grumman Demonstrates Platform Agnostic In-Flight Connectivity for US Air Force
text: SAN DIEGO, March 23, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Northrop Grumman Corporation (NYSE: NOC) successfully demonstrated the technical capability to connect a full aircraft ecosystem. The company showcased its Software Programmable Open Mission Systems Compliant (SPOC) multifunction processor in a flight test for the U.S. Air Force, highlighting the ability to integrate existing and future platforms using advanced data links.

title: Northrop Grumman Announces Webcast, Conference Call of First Quarter 2023 Financial Results
text: FALLS CHURCH, Va., March 23, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Northrop Grumman Corporation (NYSE: NOC) announced today that its first quarter 2023 financial results will be posted on its investor relations website on April 27, 2023. Prior to the market opening, and after the filing of the earnings release on Form 8-K with the Securities and Exchange Commission, the company will issue an advisory release notifying the public of the availability of the complete and full text earnings release on the company's website at http://investor.northropgrumman.com.

title: 3 High-Quality Blue-Chip Stocks to Buy for a Flight to Safety
text: There are plenty of drivers of uncertainty in the stock market right now. With high inflation, multiple geopolitical conflicts, and a banking crisis that appears to be spreading, there are plenty of reasons for investors to duck and take cover.

title: Northrop (NOC) Wins $50M Deal to Support E-2D Hawkeye Aircraft
text: Northrop (NOC) is set to provide non-recurring engineering and product support for production of the 11th lot of E-2D Hawkeye aircraft.

title: The 7 Best Defense Stocks to Buy for Our Dangerous World
text: The best defense stocks may have a banner year ahead. Last year, Russia's invasion of Ukraine began.

title: Kimberly Ross and Mary Winston Join Northrop Grumman Board of Directors
text: FALLS CHURCH, Va., March 15, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Northrop Grumman Corporation (NYSE: NOC) has elected Kimberly A. Ross and Mary A. Winston to its board of directors.

title: Northrop (NOC) Arm Wins $57.4M Deal to Support MQ-4C Triton
text: Northrop's (NOC) business unit, Northrop Grumman Systems Corp., wins a $57.4-million deal to support MQ-4C Triton air vehicles.

title: PMC Group International Announces Copperhead Chemical Company Inc. Receives Northrop Grumman Strategic Excellence Award
text: MOUNT LAUREL, N.J.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Copperhead Chemical Company Inc., a subsidiary of PMC Group International, earned Northrop Grumman's 2022 Strategic Excellence Award as part of their Supplier Excellence Awards. This award distinguishes Copperhead Chemical Company Inc. as a top supplier within Northrop Grumman's global network of over 10,000 suppliers. “The performance of Copperhead Chemical Company Inc.

title: 7 Surefire Stocks With the Most Gangbuster Potential
text: As investors try to digest the failure of two banks, related stocks are tumbling. The Nasdaq Bank Index is down more than 20% from its Feb. high due to its exposure to the now-delisted SIVB stock.

title: NOC SHAREHOLDER ALERT: ROSEN, TRUSTED NATIONAL TRIAL COUNSEL, Encourages Northrop Grumman Corporation Investors to Inquire About Class Action Investigation - NOC
text: NEW YORK , March 10, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- WHY: Rosen Law Firm, a global investor rights law firm, continues to investigate potential securities claims on behalf of shareholders of Northrop Grumman Corporation (NYSE: NOC) resulting from allegations that Northrop may have issued materially misleading business information to the investing public. SO WHAT: If you purchased Northrop securities you may be entitled to compensation without payment of any out of pocket fees or costs through a contingency fee arrangement.

title: Some of Our Favorite Stocks Are Companies Run by Women
text: International Women's Day has come and gone, but as women continue to break barriers in corporate spaces, we would like to highlight just a few of the women CEOs from heavy-hitter companies that we mention often and note how their stock is doing.

title: Dividend Growth Stock Watchlist - March 2023
text: There are 18 stocks on my dividend growth watchlist for March 2023. More than half of the stocks on my watchlist for this month are currently undervalued based on dividend yield theory.

title: Northrop Grumman: Increase In Defense Budget And Favorably Valued
text: Northrop Grumman's James Webb Space Telescope is an amazing piece of engineering. The telescope can observe and determine the chemical components of exoplanets' atmospheres. Order backlog was also very strong and is 2x the size of sales in 2022.

title: Northrop Grumman Test Fires Stage-One Solid Rocket Motor for Sentinel Missile
text: PROMONTORY, Utah, March 06, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Northrop Grumman Corporation (NYSE: NOC) conducted its first full-scale static test fire of the Sentinel stage-one solid rocket motor at the company's test facility in Promontory.

title: 3 Reasons to Sell Your Defense Stocks Now
text: Bloomberg Published an article in February that discussed the failings of the U.S. Military. If you read it, you may immediately want to sell any defense stocks you own.

title: NOC INVESTOR NOTICE: ROSEN, GLOBALLY RESPECTED INVESTOR COUNSEL, Encourages Northrop Grumman Corporation Investors to Inquire About Class Action Investigation - NOC
text: NEW YORK , March 3, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- WHY: Rosen Law Firm, a global investor rights law firm, continues to investigate potential securities claims on behalf of shareholders of Northrop Grumman Corporation (NYSE: NOC) resulting from allegations that Northrop may have issued materially misleading business information to the investing public. SO WHAT: If you purchased Northrop securities you may be entitled to compensation without payment of any out of pocket fees or costs through a contingency fee arrangement.

title: Northrop (NOC) Wins a Navy Contract for E-2D Hawkeye Aircraft
text: Northrop (NOC) is set to provide fabrication and installation support to retrofit the Delta System Software Configuration 4.0 capabilities within E-2D Advanced Hawkeye aircraft.
